body.description: Plain text email body. Merge fields: {{company_name}}, {{contact_name}}, {{buyer_code}}, {{vertical}}, {{link}} for invite only, {{failed_step}} for blocked only.

enabled.description: When false this email is not sent.

event.description: Onboarding lifecycle event this template fires on. One row per event.

recipients.description: JSON array of internal recipient emails. Used for the blocked alert. Client-facing events derive the recipient from the buyer contact.

subject.description: Email subject. Supports merge fields like {{company_name}}.
